zh.lifeSummary: 當William Fraser of Touchfaser, of Cowie and Durris於1318年出生在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾考維時，他的父親Alexander Fraser42歲，母親Mary de Brus39歲。他於1338年與Margaret Moray在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾阿爾迪結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1346年10月17日在英國英格蘭波克夏芭特爾享年28歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Fraser of Touchfaser, of Cowie and Durris于1318年出生在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾考維时，他的父亲Alexander Fraser42岁，母亲Mary de Brus39岁。他于1338年与Margaret Moray在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾阿爾迪结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1346年10月17日在英国英格兰波克夏芭特爾享年28岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fraser
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: apparently a nickname from Anglo-Norman French fraser(e), fresere ‘strawberry plant’. Fresel and Frisel, from Anglo-Norman French fresel ‘strawberry’, are early variants of the Fraser surname, the modern Gaelicized form of which is Friseal. See Frizzell . The crest on the Scottish family's coat of arms takes the form of a strawberry plant, but its antiquity is unknown. Claims of a habitational derivation, in particular from a place called la Frézelière in Anjou (France), are attractive but they lack verifiable evidence.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

History: There are two clans Fraser in Scotland, with common ancestry going back to Simon Fraser of Keith in East Lothian, who lived in the 12th century. One of these clans has its seat at Philorth Castle (subsequently re-named Cairnbulg) on the northeast coast of Scotland. Sir Alexander Fraser, 8th laird of Philorth (c. 1536–1623) converted the fishing village of Faithlie into the burgh of Fraserburgh in the 1590s. The other clan is Fraser of Lovat, associated mainly with the city of Inverness are. They are descended from Simon Fraser, a younger son, who lived in the early 14th century. In Gaelic, the head of Clan Fraser of Lovat is known as Mac Shimi ‘son of Simon’.

variants.name: Frazer
meanings: Variant of   Fraser  , associated chiefly with northern Ireland.

variants.name: Frashier
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frizzell
meanings: English and Irish: nickname from Old French fresel, frisel ‘lace, ribbon, braid, brooch, frill, ruff’, for someone with an ornate style of dress, or ‘object of little value’ (a diminutive of frese, of ancient Germanic origin).
Scottish: from Anglo-Norman French fresel ‘strawberry’, an alternative form of Fraser .

variants.name: Frazier
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frasher
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .
Possibly an altered form of German Fratzscher (see Frutchey ).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Fraser of Touchfaser, of Cowie and Durris was born in 1318, in Cowie, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, his father, Alexander Fraser, was 42 and his mother, Mary de Brus, was 39. He married Margaret Moray in 1338, in Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 17 October 1346, in Battle, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 28.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Fraser of Touchfaser, of Cowie and Durris est né en 1318, à Cowie, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, son père, Alexander Fraser, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Mary de Brus, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Moray en 1338, à Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 17 octobre 1346, à Battle, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 28 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Fraser of Touchfaser, of Cowie and Durris 1318 in Cowie, Aberdeenshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alexander Fraser 42 und seine Mutter Mary de Brus 39. Er hat 1338 in Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland Margaret Moray geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 17. Oktober 1346 im Alter von 28 Jahren in Battle, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Fraser of Touchfaser, of Cowie and Durris è nato il nel 1318 nel Cowie, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Alexander Fraser, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Mary de Brus, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Moray nel 1338, nel Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 17 ottobre 1346, nel Battle, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 28 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: William Fraser of Touchfaser, of Cowie and Durris(이)가 1318년 스컷랜드 압르디실르 코위에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander Fraser(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary de Brus(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1338년 스컷랜드 압르디실르 압르디에서 Margaret Moray(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1346년 10월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 바틀에서 28세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Margaret Moray em 1338, em Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Fraser of Touchfaser, of Cowie and Durris родился в 1318 г. в местности коуи, абирдиншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Alexander Fraser было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Mary de Brus, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Moray в 1338 г. в местности абирдин, абирдиншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 17 октября 1346 г. в местности баттл, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 28 лет.
